result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded all 9 wave datasets from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, standardized missing value codes (-9=Refused, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked), created age-specific sex variables (sex14 through sex32), and generated a consolidated sex variable prioritizing the most recent valid response. The cleaned dataset with 16,111 observations and 11 variables (NSID, sex, sex14-sex32) has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
